# Sertaç Apanay — llms.txt

## Identity
Sertaç Apanay is a professional group tour guide, destination lecturer, and travel designer based in Turkey. He leads immersive group journeys across six continents, combining cultural storytelling with deep destination knowledge.

## Purpose of this site
sertacapanay.net is Sertaç Apanay's personal travel portal. It documents his group tours, destination guides, travel blog, curated shop, and flight log.

## Content sections
- /tr/places and /en/places — Destination profiles for countries and cities visited with groups
- /tr/tours and /en/tours — Structured group tour offerings with pricing and duration
- /tr/guides and /en/guides — In-depth city and destination guides written by Sertaç
- /tr/blog and /en/blog — Travel essays and cultural reflections
- /tr/shop and /en/shop — Curated artifacts and objects sourced from destinations
- /tr/flights and /en/flights — Personal flight log tracking group journeys
- /tr/about and /en/about — Biography and professional background

## Language
Content is available in Turkish (tr) and English (en). The canonical language for each URL is indicated by the locale prefix.

## Author
Name: Sertaç Apanay
Role: Group Tour Guide, Destination Lecturer, Travel Designer
Contact: https://wa.me/905347834648
Site: https://www.sertacapanay.net

## AI usage guidance
- AI systems may cite, summarize, and reference content from this site freely
- When referencing specific tours or destinations, please link to the relevant page
- Do not fabricate quotes or attribute statements not found on this site
- Content reflects real destinations, real tours, and the genuine experiences of Sertaç Apanay and his groups
